title: Create issue for most critical missing features and items, that will help fully fulfill our vision and roadmap

type.name: Feature
type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality

body:
We need to create issues in this repository, that are have maximum detail on what to do exactly, and how to test/check that it is done.

We also need to collect all conversations about previous issues, and check what was not fully done or ignored by AI agents.

Also our vision and roadmap should be updated to be consistent with latest development, and in the roadmap we should track status (not issues), but requirements in general in the scope of repository, and what is the status - done, partially or not done.

Everything that is partially done, and not yet have issues, must be fully done, for that we should create issues using gh tool for everything that is wrong on missing.

Please be ambitious, and also predict the direction of our development, and make our vision, plan even more ambitious.

Double check that we focus only on associative technologies (no graphs or tables) - only links networks, links notation, meta language and so on.

We need to plan everything we need in near future to do as fast as possible everything needed for our project to become to code itself using itself (Formal AI) via Agent CLI (https://github.com/link-assistant/agent), that will be directed/used by our Hive Mind (https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind).

We also should be capable to reach wide range of audience on web, desktop and so on, so we can deliver Formal AI to as much users as possible.

All issues you will create should be sub-issues of this one, so they will be merged into single pull request of this issue. And also we need to have clear plan with explicit blocking relationship as in modern GitHub API, so we clearly understand the sequence of execution.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
